task: I realized the issue with attach for gemini. It doesn't say "Hook execution for SessionEnd: 1 hooks executed successfully" for a session in Gemini if I start it in a different directory other than the root folder. Therefore, when we forcefully attach it, it doesn't have all the proper metadata. I don't think we should allow the attachment to go through in this case.
user_feedback_text: I realized the issue with attach for gemini. It doesn't say "Hook execution for SessionEnd: 1 hooks executed successfully" for a session in Gemini if I start it in a different directory other than the root folder. Therefore, when we forcefully attach it, it doesn't have all the proper metadata. I don't think we should allow the attachment to go through in this case.
